data.name: Come Right Inn - Season 1
data.detailed_description:
The "Come Right Inn" is a luxurious 5-star hotel in the heart of LA, where the unspoken dress code is long legs, tanned skin, and no shame. This hotspot attracts the elite, accustomed to a lifestyle where every desire is effortlessly fulfilled—for the right price. But what secrets are hidden behind this glamorous facade?

Your sister worked at this hotel. Six months ago, she vanished in LA—or so the official story goes. How far would you go to find the truth?

Voiced by Professionals

Immerse yourself in the story with voice acting that adds depth to every character.

Stunning Animations

Enjoy fluid, high-quality animations that bring key scenes to life.

Uncover the Secrets

Explore a story full of twists and turns, where nothing is as it seems.

Date Your Dream Girls

Each girl has her own personality. Choose your approach wisely to win her affection.

Engage and Explore

Dive into conversations — chat, flirt, or push boundaries. Explore characters’ lives through an in-game social media app.

Your Journey Begins

Enjoy around 6 hours of immersive gameplay! 

Come Right Inn — Season 1 (Episodes 1–4):

  • Episode 1 — First Shift

  • Episode 2 — The Missing Bracelet

  • Episode 3 — Behind Closed Doors

  • Episode 4 — The Turn

data.short_description: The Come Right Inn, a 5-star LA hotel, offers the elite anything they desire, as long as they’re willing to pay. Your sister worked there until her mysterious disappearance six months ago. Now, it's up to you to uncover the hidden truths behind the allure and find out what really happened.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Window 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Version: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Version: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
